title: 007-01: E2E validation on Kind cluster
description: Deploy sandbox-agent integration to local Kind cluster and validate the full acceptance checklist: workspace session → harness run → agent session → prompt → events → stop/resume. Fix any issues discovered. Task 3.2 from the change proposal.

title: Deploy to Kind and run full acceptance checklist, fix issues iteratively
Token-sync sidecar: OAuth token persistence for harness pods
description: Build a Go sidecar binary that runs alongside the harness container, watches agent CLI auth files for token refreshes, and PATCHes the kocao-agent-oauth Secret so subsequent pods get fresh tokens. Includes seed helper, RBAC, Dockerfile, operator pod wiring, and dev-kind overlay updates.

title: Build token-sync Go binary (cmd/token-sync) with file watcher and Secret PATCH
Dockerfile, RBAC, operator pod wiring for token-sync sidecar
Seed helper (make seed-agent-secrets) and dev-kind overlay updates
E2E validation: deploy to Kind with real OAuth, verify token refresh cycle
kocao-sidecar: multi-concern harness sidecar (starting with token sync)
description: Build a kocao-sidecar binary that runs alongside the harness container. First feature: OAuth token sync (watches agent CLI auth files, PATCHes Secret on refresh). Designed for future concerns: telemetry, IPC, session capture. Includes seed helper, RBAC, Dockerfile, operator pod wiring, and dev-kind overlay updates.

title: Build kocao-sidecar Go binary with token-sync feature (cmd/kocao-sidecar, internal/sidecar/tokensync)
Dockerfile, RBAC, operator pod wiring, and Makefile for kocao-sidecar
Seed helper (make seed-agent-secrets) and dev-kind overlay updates
E2E validation: deploy to Kind with real OAuth, verify token refresh cycle

description: Repair the live MicroK8s agent workflow gaps: agent list returns empty, agent exec fails with EOF, agent logs returns zero-value events, and agent stop times out. Then regenerate demos from repaired behavior.
